Name: Tokopedia
Description: In April 2020, the Indonesian e-commerce giant Tokopedia suffered a massive data breach. The compromised data included user names, emails, and hashed passwords.

Name: LinkedIn
Description: LinkedIn suffered a data scrape that affected 700 million users. The data was posted for sale on a popular hacking forum.

Name: Bukalapak
Description: In early 2019, the Indonesian e-commerce site Bukalapak had its database breached by a Pakistani hacker known as Gnosticplayers.

Name: Adobe
Description: In October 2013, Adobe was breached, resulting in the theft of customer records including encrypted passwords and credit card information.

Name: Canva
Description: Graphic design platform Canva suffered a data breach in 2019, exposing the database containing emails and hashed passwords of millions of users.

Name: BSI (Bank Syariah Indonesia)
Description: Bank Syariah Indonesia suffered a ransomware attack by the LockBit gang, which allegedly stole 1.5TB of data including customer records and employee information.
